Madeira / Climb

Above the clouds, below the ego

March 13, 2026 9 min read

A steep path, a wet jacket, and the useful humiliation of realizing the mountain is not impressed.

. Every turn looked like it might soften, and every turn declined.

Mist moved across the ridge fast enough to make distance feel temporary. One moment I could see the valley, the next I could see only the next few stones and my own breath.

That was probably the lesson, if I am being honest. I wanted the view before I had earned the step. I wanted the summit to redeem the discomfort. The mountain offered no such bargain.

So I kept walking.

Above the clouds, the world got very quiet. Not gentle exactly. Clear. The kind of clear that removes your excuses without making a speech.

Now Roaming you are now roaming Travel / Experience / Enlightenment
